title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 192.744 - Department examination or treatment of individual not intended — violations, penalty
text:
192.744.  Department examination or treatment of individual not intended — violations, penalty. — 1.  Nothing in sections 192.735 to 192.744 shall be construed to compel any individual to submit to any medical or department of health and senior services examination, treatment or supervision of any kind.
  2.  Violation of any provisions of sections 192.735 to 192.739 shall be an infraction.
(L. 1986 H.B. 1243 § 6)
